results.rendered_html:
sthūla—lakṣa or sthūla—lakṣya, mfn. ‘having large aims or attributes’, munificent, liberal, generous,  Yājñ. ;  MBh.  &c.;
wise, learned,  W. ;
mindful of both benefits and injuries,  ib. ;
taking a wide aim, shooting at a large target (-tva n.),  Śiś.
